creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, 

   Here is a simple patch for biology/py-biopython update to 1.68

--- Makefile    (revision 422411)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      biopython
-PORTVERSION=   1.66
+PORTVERSION=   1.68
 CATEGORIES=    biology python
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.biopython.org/DIST/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 422411)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
-SHA256 (biopython-1.66.tar.gz) = 5178ea3b343b1d8710f39205386093e5369ed653aa020e1b0c4b7622a59346c1
-SIZE (biopython-1.66.tar.gz) = 13724754
+TIMESTAMP = 1474421232
+SHA256 (biopython-1.68.tar.gz) = d1dc09d1ddc8e90833f507cf09f80fa9ee1537d319058d1c44fe9c09be3d0c1f
+SIZE (biopython-1.68.tar.gz) = 14445813
